kw.name: Quando ele preenche os campos de pagamento
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'John Doe' into text field 'css:input[name="payee.name"]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text '123 Elm St' into text field 'css:input[name="payee.address.street"]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Capturar Print Na Pasta Da Funcionalidade
Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Create Directory
kw.doc: Creates the specified directory.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${file} = /home/runner/work/Parabank-Robot/Parabank-Robot/Results/Resources-BillPay/Evidences/BillPay/QBEF-39 Bill Pay FAIL - Not Value step-02.png
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Então o pagamento NÃO deve ser realizado devido ao campo quantidade não estar preenchido
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Capturar Print Na Pasta Da Funcionalidade
Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Create Directory
kw.doc: Creates the specified directory.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${file} = /home/runner/work/Parabank-Robot/Parabank-Robot/Results/Resources-BillPay/Evidences/BillPay/QBEF-39 Bill Pay FAIL - Not Value step-03.png

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

errors.msg: The chromedriver version (145.0.7632.117) detected in PATH at /usr/bin/chromedriver might not be compatible with the detected chrome version (146.0.7680.71); currently, chromedriver 146.0.7680.72 is recommended for chrome 146.*, so it is advised to delete the driver in PATH and retry
